'''kavoko''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylodextrin|xylodextrin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-v-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylodextrin|xylodextrin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| kavoko
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæveketh|kæveketh]] || [[word:kævekej|kævekej]] || [[word:kævekesh|kævekesh]] || [[word:kæveke|kæveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kavovokoth|kavovokoth]] || [[word:kavovokoj|kavovokoj]] || [[word:kavovokosh|kavovokosh]] || [[word:kavovoko|kavovoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kavokoth|kavokoth]] || [[word:kavokoj|kavokoj]] || [[word:kavokosh|kavokosh]] || [[word:kavoko|kavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kavofkoth|kavofkoth]] || [[word:kavofkoj|kavofkoj]] || [[word:kavofkosh|kavofkosh]] || [[word:kavofkof|kavofkof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kavokotho|kavokotho]] || [[word:kavokojo|kavokojo]] || [[word:kavokosho|kavokosho]] || [[word:kavokoko|kavokoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kavokoth|kavokoth]] || [[word:kavokoj|kavokoj]] || [[word:kavokosh|kavokosh]] || [[word:kavoko|kavoko]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kavokothol|kavokothol]] || [[word:kavokojol|kavokojol]] || [[word:kavokoshol|kavokoshol]] || [[word:kavokokol|kavokokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kavokothotho|kavokothotho]] || [[word:kavokojojo|kavokojojo]] || [[word:kavokoshosho|kavokoshosho]] || [[word:kavokoko|kavokoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kavokothon|kavokothon]] || [[word:kavokojon|kavokojon]] || [[word:kavokoshon|kavokoshon]] || [[word:kavokokon|kavokokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kavokothoro|kavokothoro]] || [[word:kavokojoro|kavokojoro]] || [[word:kavokoshoro|kavokoshoro]] || [[word:kavokokoro|kavokokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
